mapper.select: SELECT * FROM crm_customer_grade_rule WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY priority ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM crm_customer_grade_rule WHERE rule_type = #{ruleType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY priority ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM crm_customer_grade_rule WHERE target_grade = #{targetGrade} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY priority ASC, create_time DESC
